text: Ladies and gentlemen, this is how we get our data.
You simply ask Data Guy for anything you want and he'll get it for you.
Marketing, sales, product, it all runs through the pipeline.
It's handcrafted.
Last week I asked Data Guy,
can you give me a list of every tech company hiring VPs of marketing in North America?
I never got anything.
We built our internal data system from scratch.
Air table, handle schema, Zapier can lose it all together.
And uh...
We have a spreadsheet that handles version control and Dropbox.
Sometimes data just disappears from prod,
but I slack Data Guy and sometimes it gets fixed.
This looks great. Thanks, Data Guy.
Last month we sent a campaign to the customers in our database.
Turns out we sent 400 emails to the same guy.
Turns out we had a lot of Alex's in the database.
All at the same last name.
But it's okay.
I had Data Guy creating entity resolution system from scratch.
We had to find all the single family home foreclosures in Bushwick.
We hired interns.
Boss had Data Guy set up chat GPT to handle all of our compliance document ingestors.
I've had to change my social security five times.
And I got a cease and desist from the State Department.
